overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a space exploration game showing a spaceship with blue thrusters flying through a crimson nebula toward a large green planet. Brief laser fire passes by as the vessel makes its approach.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula with distant planetary body

events.description: energy projectiles streak horizontally across the frame from left to right

agents.ego_description: piloting a small spaceship with twin blue thrusters through a crimson nebula toward a green planet

entered.detail: large pale green spherical celestial body with a prominent dark circular crater or feature on its surface
vibrant crimson and purple nebula clouds with scattered stars filling the distant backdrop

segments.scene_description: The spaceship flies through a vast crimson nebula toward a distant green planet. Brief laser fire streaks past the vessel from the left. The planet remains centered in the frame against the starry red backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: planetary approach trajectory in deep space

agents.ego_description: continuing the descent toward the green planet, which now fills significantly more of the viewport

segments.scene_description: The spaceship continues its approach toward the green planet, which has grown substantially larger in the frame. The red nebula backdrop remains constant as the vessel closes the final distance to the planetary body.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward trajectory through a crimson nebula as a spaceship closes the distance toward a massive green planet. It begins with the vessel gliding through a vast expanse of starry red clouds, while brief streaks of laser fire flash past from the left. As the ship maintains its course, the distant green sphere gradually expands, dominating more of the frame against the constant crimson backdrop. The scene then shifts from a wide cosmic vista to a close approach, with the planetary body growing substantially larger as the vessel reaches the final stretch of its journey.
